title: Suitably Stackable Stew (Port)
description: Stack stews up to 16! Quick and easy! Port of the original mod by sfort__
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e87489ba4ddab5fdff9b3e4d8069e7b1b4a09030_0.webp)

Port of [the original mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/suitably-stackable-stew) by [sfort__](https://github.com/sfort)

Stews are a great food but not only are they a pain to make but also don't stack!

This mod attempts to make them viable again by stacking them up to 16

It affects: beetroot soup, mushroom stew,  rabbit stew and suspicious stew


## ❤️ Credits

sfort__
